_comment: Phase-4 sequencing fixture. User on short final to LSZH RWY 14; 3 aircraft already in the pattern (two on final, one on downwind) and one stopped on the runway 600 m past the threshold. Active-runway block lets the traffic_phase_classifier promote targets to Pattern/Final. Geometry: RWY 14 threshold (47.4794, 8.5253), heading 137° true.

targets._comment: Final #1 — 1 NM short of threshold, descending. Closest to landing.
Final #2 — 2.5 NM short of threshold, descending.
Downwind on the left — abeam threshold, opposite heading. Promotes to Pattern via classifier.
Stopped on the runway — 600 m past RWY 14 threshold, on centerline. Groundspeed 0 → classifier returns OnGround; sequencing treats it as a runway occupant.
